Figure1g

MJY

2024-09-04

Figure 1g

OUTLINES:

1. Use deeptools to compute signal matrices.

2. Use deeptools to generate profile plots for ChIP-seq data at boundaries.

#’ ##
#’ 1. Use deeptools to compute signal matrices.


conda create -n deeptools
conda activate deeptools
conda install -c bioconda deeptools

cd /public/home/mjy/HCC/share/figure1g
nohup bash compMat.sh 1>compMat.log 2>&1 &

zcat merged_6w_rep1_matrix.gz | head
zcat merged_10w_matrix.gz | head
zcat merged_18w_matrix.gz | head

#’ “compMat.sh” contains the following information


# usage: An example usage is:
#   computeMatrix reference-point -S <biwig file(s)> -R <bed file> -a 3000 -b 3000

# Define signal track paths for control and CCl4 treatment groups at 6w, 10w, and 18w
ctrl_6w=/public/home/mjy/HCC/chip/ctcf/macs2/separate/separate/ctrl_6w_1/signalTrack
ctrl_10w=/public/home/mjy/HCC/chip/bam/ctcf_bam/merge/ctrl_10w/signalTrack
ctrl_18w=/public/home/mjy/HCC/chip/bam/ctcf_bam/merge/ctrl_18w/signalTrack
ccl4_6w=/public/home/mjy/HCC/chip/ctcf/macs2/separate/separate/ccl4_6w_1/signalTrack
ccl4_10w=/public/home/mjy/HCC/chip/bam/ctcf_bam/merge/ccl4_10w/signalTrack
ccl4_18w=/public/home/mjy/HCC/chip/bam/ctcf_bam/merge/ccl4_18w/signalTrack

# Define output and input paths
output=/public/home/mjy/HCC/share/figure1g/02_matrix
input=/public/home/mjy/HCC/share/figure1g/01_loop_bed

mkdir -p ${output}

# Generate matrix for 6w samples
computeMatrix reference-point  --referencePoint center \
                               -p 24 \
                               -bs 25000 \
                               --skipZeros \
                               -a 500000 -b 500000 \
                               -R ${input}/total_merged.boundaries.bed \
                               -S ${ctrl_6w}/ctrl_6w_1_FE.sorted.bw ${ccl4_6w}/ccl4_6w_1_FE.sorted.bw  \
                               -o ${output}/merged_6w_rep1_matrix.gz 

wait
echo "merge_6w finish"

# Generate matrix for 10w samples
computeMatrix reference-point  --referencePoint center \
                               -p 24 \
                               -bs 25000 \
                               --skipZeros \
                               -a 500000 -b 500000 \
                               -R ${input}/total_merged.boundaries.bed \
                               -S ${ctrl_10w}/ctrl_10w_FE.sorted.bw ${ccl4_10w}/ccl4_10w_FE.sorted.bw  \
                               -o ${output}/merged_10w_matrix.gz 

wait
echo "merge_10w finish"

# Generate matrix for 18w samples
computeMatrix reference-point  --referencePoint center \
                               -p 24 \
                               -bs 25000 \
                               --skipZeros \
                               -a 500000 -b 500000 \
                               -R ${input}/total_merged.boundaries.bed \
                               -S ${ctrl_18w}/ctrl_18w_FE.sorted.bw ${ccl4_18w}/ccl4_18w_FE.sorted.bw  \
                               -o ${output}/merged_18w_matrix.gz 

wait
echo "merge_18w finish"

merged_6w_rep1_matrix.gz

merged_10w_matrix.gz

merged_18w_matrix.gz

#’ ##
#’ 2. Use deeptools to generates profile plots for ChIP-seq data at boundaries.


cd /public/home/mjy/HCC/share/figure1g
nohup bash process.sh 1>process.log 2>&1 &

#’ “process.sh” contains the following information.


# usage: plotProfile -m matrix.gz

# Define input matrix and output directory
input=/public/home/mjy/HCC/share/figure1g/02_matrix
output=/public/home/mjy/HCC/share/figure1g/03_profile

mkdir -p ${output}

# Generate profile plot for 6w samples
plotProfile -m ${input}/merged_6w_rep1_matrix.gz  \
          --outFileName ${output}/boundary_6w.png \
          --yMin 0.55 \
          --yMax 0.75  \
          --plotHeight 8 \
          --plotWidth 8 \
          --colors "#00BFC4" "#F8766D" \
          --perGroup  \
          --startLabel "" \
          --endLabel "" \
          --samplesLabel "ctrl_6w" "ccl4_6w"  \
          --plotTitle "" \
          --refPointLabel "boundary" \
          -T "6w_boundary_rep1" 

wait
echo "6w_boundary finish!"

# Generate profile plot for 10w samples
plotProfile -m ${input}/merged_10w_matrix.gz \
            --outFileName ${output}/boundary_10w.png \
            --yMin 0.55 \
            --yMax 0.75  \
            --plotHeight 8 \
            --plotWidth 8 \
            --colors "#00BFC4" "#F8766D" \
            --perGroup  \
            --startLabel "" \
            --endLabel "" \
            --samplesLabel  "Con_10w" "Cir_10w"    \
            --plotTitle "" \
            --refPointLabel "boundary" \
            -T "10w_boundary" 

wait
echo "10w_boundary finish!"

# Generate profile plot for 18w samples
plotProfile -m ${input}/merged_18w_matrix.gz \
            --outFileName ${output}/boundary_18w.png \
            --yMin 0.55 \
            --yMax 0.75  \
            --plotHeight 8 \
            --plotWidth 8 \
            --colors "#00BFC4" "#F8766D" \
            --perGroup  \
            --startLabel "" \
            --endLabel "" \
            --samplesLabel  "Con_18w" "HCC_18w"    \
            --plotTitle "" \
            --refPointLabel "boundary" \
            -T "18w_boundary" 
wait
echo "18w_boundary finish!"

6w_boundary_rep1

10w_boundary

18w_boundary
